artifacts.name: Low-Level Design Document
artifacts.description: LLD for FR-13 covering API, data models, components, sequences, error handling, security

summary.work_completed: Created low-level design document for FR-13 (Save Model to Browser Storage).
key_findings: LocalForage provides a suitable abstraction for browser storage with IndexedDB fallback.
Zustand store is appropriate for notification state.
Error handling must specifically address QuotaExceededError for storage full scenario.
Performance requirement of ≤500ms for 1,000 bricks is achievable with JSON serialization and IndexedDB.

human_review_required.reason: Verify all acceptance criteria from FR-PERS-001 are covered
Confirm LocalForage + JSON serialization meets 500ms requirement for 1,000 bricks
Ensure QuotaExceededError and other errors are handled with user-friendly messages

recommended_actions: Review PR #44 for technical accuracy and completeness
Check alignment with PRD and TECH_ARCHITECTURE
Approve PR if design is satisfactory, or request changes with specific feedback
